name: [GRIDHAND] CRM Sync Agent - New contact in HubSpot → sync to Airtable + Mailchimp

gridhand.scenario: New contact in HubSpot → sync to Airtable + Mailchimp
gridhand.description: When a new contact is added to HubSpot, the workflow is triggered, automatically syncing the contact's information to Airtable, where it is organized and updated in real-time, and also to Mailchimp, where the contact is added to a designated email list. This seamless integration occurs instantly, ensuring that the business owner's customer database is consistently up-to-date across all platforms, saving time and effort. As a result, the business owner can focus on nurturing leads and creating targeted marketing campaigns, knowing that their contact lists are always current and accurate, leading to more effective outreach and engagement with customers.
